nl: How much did I spend on groceries last month?
sql: SELECT sum(t.amount) AS total_spent FROM analytics.transactions t JOIN analytics.categories c ON c.id = t.category_id WHERE c.name = 'Groceries' AND t.transaction_date >= date_trunc('month', now() - interval '1 month') AND t.transaction_date < date_trunc('month', now()) LIMIT 1000

nl: What's my total income this year?
sql: SELECT sum(t.amount) AS total_income FROM analytics.transactions t JOIN analytics.categories c ON c.id = t.category_id WHERE c.is_income = true AND t.transaction_date >= date_trunc('year', now()) LIMIT 1000

nl: Show me my top 5 spending categories last month
sql: SELECT c.name, sum(t.amount) AS total FROM analytics.transactions t JOIN analytics.categories c ON c.id = t.category_id WHERE c.is_income = false AND t.transaction_date >= date_trunc('month', now() - interval '1 month') AND t.transaction_date < date_trunc('month', now()) GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY total ASC LIMIT 5

nl: Am I over budget on dining out this month?
sql: SELECT b.amount_limit, sum(t.amount) AS actual_spend FROM analytics.budgets b JOIN analytics.categories c ON c.id = b.category_id LEFT JOIN analytics.transactions t ON t.category_id = c.id AND t.transaction_date >= date_trunc('month', now()) AND t.transaction_date < date_trunc('month', now()) + interval '1 month' WHERE c.name = 'Dining Out' AND b.budget_month = date_trunc('month', now()) GROUP BY b.amount_limit LIMIT 1000

nl: List my accounts and their institutions
sql: SELECT name, account_type, institution FROM analytics.accounts ORDER BY name LIMIT 1000

nl: What was my cashflow for each of the last 6 months?
sql: SELECT summary_month, sum(CASE WHEN total_amount > 0 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) - sum(CASE WHEN total_amount < 0 THEN -total_amount ELSE 0 END) AS net_cashflow FROM analytics.monthly_summary WHERE summary_month >= date_trunc('month', now()) - interval '6 months' GROUP BY summary_month ORDER BY summary_month LIMIT 1000
